full_text:
Yin Damu 尹大目
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yin Damu (尹大目). Tried to stop Wen Qin during Guanqiu Jian’s rebellion, but failed. Yin Damu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
